holdings.n: New Oriental Education & Technology Group Inc.

holdings.infoBox: KEMQ is an equity ETF with a total of 67 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 3.80%, United Microelectronics at 3.80%, Sea Limited at 3.69%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.59%, and MercadoLibre at 3.43%.

overview.description: The KraneShares Emerging Markets Consumer Technology Index ETF (KEMQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks a committee-selected, tier-weighted index of 50 emerging market technology companies. KEMQ was launched on Oct 11, 2017 and is issued by KraneShares.
infoTable: Solactive Emerging Markets Consumer Technology Index (GTR)
